title: Your AI Agent Needs a Tool
summary: AWS Developers explains how tool calling enables AI agents to move beyond simple text generation by requesting and executing external tools. Tool calling works through a loop where the model requests a tool, the framework executes it, and the loop repeats. Key components include schema, description, and handler functions defined in system prompts.
writeup: This AWS Developers video explains tool calling, the mechanism that lets AI agents go beyond text generation to request and execute external tools. It describes the core loop: the model requests a tool, the framework executes it, and the cycle repeats. The key takeaways cover the components that make this work, including the schema, the description, and the handler functions defined in system prompts, with reference to function calling and MCP.
